notes: Model number GSM4230P. Specs cross-confirmed across Netgear's official product page (netgear.com/business/wired/switches/fully-managed/gsm4230p/), Netgear support (netgear.com/support/product/gsm4230p), and reseller detail pages. The RJ45 console port physically uses an RJ45 connector but carries RS232 signaling — mapped to rj45 connector with note. IEC inlet is C14 type with built-in on/off switch. Ports face rearward by default for clean AV rack integration; device can be reverse-mounted for front-facing access. 1U rackmount, 440×257×43.2 mm.

ports.name: Port 1–24 (PoE+)
ports.note: 24x 10/100/1000BASE-T RJ45 with PoE+ (802.3at), 300W total budget, 30W per port

ports.name: Console (USB-C)
ports.note: USB Type-C console port; USB-C-to-serial cable included

ports.name: Console (RJ45)
ports.note: RS232 serial console via RJ45 connector; RJ45-to-DB9 adapter cable included — physical connector is RJ45 but carries RS232 signal

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet with integral on/off switch; power consumption 35.8W (no PoE) to 401W (full PoE load)
